jd_text: Primary Purpose Of The Job Provide strategic advice, manage and drive initiatives and actions required to expand the scale of infrastructure and operations of Ras Laffan Port as required to meet the requirements of QatarEnergy’s industrial development projects in RLC. Required Experience And Skills At least 20 years’ experience in shipping operations or ports preferably in the Oil and Gas sector. Experience in leading major projects in ports preferred. Sound knowledge of gas/oil industry bodies, National and International Maritime and Shipping regulations. Strong organizational and analytical skills with a high level of attention to detail. Capacity to engage and influence senior personnel in VS, VP, VI, VM and Asset Operators. Educational Qualifications Master Mariner Class 1 or Bachelor’s degree, preferably in Marine Transportation or Marine Engineering. MBA preferred.
